sources.cleaned_content:
# IK Multi TR 1 Trigger Sprayer - 1 L

![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/IK-Multi-TR-1-Trigger-Sprayer-1-L_2319_1_m_2938.jpg)

$14.99

### Quantity Discounts

| Quantity | Price | Savings |
| 2 - 3 | $13.99 | 7% |
| 4 + | $13.49 | 10% |

### Available Sizes

1 L - $14.99

### Product Information

- Chemical resistant spray bottle
- Translucent tank and indicator levels
- 1 Liter (35 oz) usable total capacity
- Strong base for stability
- Adjustable spray nozzle
- Product Code: 84170

### Customer Reviews

40% of customers said that they would buy this item again
Based upon 5 ratings

### Product Description

When you pick up the IK Multi TR 1 Trigger Sprayer you instantly know this is a refined sprayer you will own for a long time. This bottle has been specially developed for the rigors of daily use and the atomizer is made of high-quality materials that are very resistant to most chemicals such as acids, alkalines and degreasers, etc. The plastic is strong and has a commercial-grade translucent tank with a level indicator, perfect for easy dilution of your favorite detailing chemicals. The adjustable nozzle allows you to spray anywhere from a tight stream to a wide mist for the exact right application. Utilizing the 1 Liter (35 oz) total capacity provides you with plenty of storage for window cleaners, interior cleaners, mild degreasers, mild wheel cleaners, etc. The strong and well-balanced base of this unit ensures it will last a long time and greatly reduces the risk of any unwanted tipping. Step up your spray bottle game with the IK Multi TR 1 Trigger Sprayer!

360 vs Standard - The Multi TR 1 360 features a flexible tube, designed to pull chemical out of the unit when used at any angle. The standard Multi TR 1 does not feature this flexible tube.

Optimal Products:
- Disinfectants, Neutral Products, Alcohols, Alkalis and Ketones

Suitable:
- Acids

If you are using Hydrocarbon-Based Solvents, Oils/Lubricants, Brake Cleaners, Petroleum By-Products, and Solvent-Based Pesticides reach for the IK Multi HC TR 1 Trigger Sprayer for Hydrocarbons.

### Videos

IK Trigger Sprayers
![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/gmA6etErmGg/hqdefault.jpg)

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Nathan C. on 9/10/2021
DI Verified Purchase
Would they buy this item again? Yes

Overall, this is a nice spray bottle with a subpar trigger. Here is a list of pros & cons.

Pros:
- High Build quality
- Thick Plastic means the bottle doesn't collapse on itself
- Can be dropped and the thicker black plastic frame will take the hit
- Clear markings on the side for precise measurements
- One pull of the trigger will spray at least double of other bottles to cover more area

Cons:
- Takes a few sprays to get chemical up if bottle isn't used often
- Trigger is held on with two raised bumps which isn't secure. I had a trigger already break from there.
- Label included with bottles is useless, falls out & doesn't stay in place.
- Wide base sometimes makes storage difficult since it takes up more space at the bottom.

That's it, overall, considering only 1 of about 8 bottles has broken so far, I'd still recommend this sprayer over others, less trigger pulls means more coverage and less fatigue. Replacement triggers would be nice as the warranty process seems to be lengthy.

Reviewed by Michael C. on 6/15/2021
DI Verified Purchase
Would they buy this item again? Yes

This is the Cadillac of sprayers. Everything on it is just top quality and you can tell by the trajectory and particles when spraying it that it's a really good product. Above the rest.

Reviewed by saul v. on 11/3/2021
DI Verified Purchase
Would they buy this item again? No

I would not buy again only due to the ergo of the sprayer. It digs in between your thumb and finger and it gets heavy and have to switch hands. I think if this didn't come out during the pandemic, they would have another choice. Other than that bottle size and material is good.

# IK MULTI TR 1 360° Trigger Sprayer

Brand: IK Sprayers
Product code: 84177

![image](/DynamicImages/18338-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png)
![image](/DynamicImages/18339-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png)
![image](/DynamicImages/18340-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png)
![image](/DynamicImages/18341-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png)

Selected Type: Trigger Sprayer
Price: 13.45
In Stock

## Multi Purpose 1 Litre Sprayer

IK MULTI TR 1 Spray Bottle is great for a wide range of sectors such as cleaning and disinfection, automotive and vehicle detailing, DIY or industrial applications and air conditioning (HVAC). Now featuring 360° spraying even when upside down.

With such a versatile spray bottle all detailing jobs can be done with ease. Even jobs that may have been more difficult in the past, especially those requiring the sprayer to be upside down for wheel arches or interior hood linings the IK Multi TR 1 will be able to hand the complexity. The adjustable conical nozzle gives for greater accuracy between a fine mist and jet settings; pair that with the ergonomic handle design, for comfortable use, and this trigger spray mixing bottle is a favourite amongst detailers. IK Sprayers haven't stopped there the IK Multi 1 also comes with a translucent design with products indicators, so you know how much is product you have left.

The wide base and content identifying label gives you confidence in putting the product down when in use and picking up the correct spray bottle from the cupboard without hunting around every time. If you require a smaller container, check out the Mini Version or if one for working with harsher chemicals.

Features:
- Nozzles - Adjustable Conical Nozzle
- 360° spray, even upside down
- Useful capacity - 1 Litre
- Total capacity - 1 Litre
- Gross weight - 0.18 Kg
- Net weight - 0.18 Kg

How To Use:
- Depressurise and cleaner after each use.
- Dispose of chemicals according to legislation & regulations.
- If the nozzle is blocked clean with water and do not use metal objects.
- If the filter is blocked clean it with water.
- Store the sprayer indoors and avoid temperatures about or below 5-30°C.
- Apply grease to moving parts and seals regularly.

Documents:
- IK Sprayer Chemical Table: /documents/IK-Sprayer-Chemical-Table.pdf
- IK Sprayer Instruction Booklet: /documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/84170-INS.pdf
- IK Sprayer Catalogue: /documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/84170-CAT.pdf

# iK Multi TR1 Sprayer - Empty Spray Bottle 1000ml

Brand: IK Sprayers
Price: 12,30

![image](https://www.cardetail.be/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/ik-multi-tr-1-new-web-1.jpg)

- Professional spray bottle
- Resistant to the most aggressive liquids
- Specially developed for detailing
- Provision for own label

## Description

## iK Multi TR1 Sprayer

iK Multi TR 1 Sprayer is a professional spray bottle that can withstand aggressive liquids and most acids! In addition to the popular iK Multi Pro 2 sprayer, this spray bottle was also developed specifically for the detailing world. The included atomizer is highly resistant to all kinds of chemicals. The sprayer is made of the highest quality and is even resistant to most acids!

### Empty spray bottle for detailing

The iK Multi TR Sprayer features a clear bottle with level indicator. The spray bottle also has a provision for a private label. The high quality and sturdiness guarantees a very long service life. Moreover, the iK Sprayer is equipped with a good base which prevents the bottle from falling over. The nozzle is adjustable from a straight jet to a misting spray pattern.

## Features iK Multi TR1 Trigger Sprayer

- Professional spray bottle
- Provision for own label
- Resistant to the most aggressive liquids
- Specially developed for detailing applications
- Limited resistance to acids
- Not suitable for solvents
- Capacity: 1000 ml / 1 liter

### What products and chemicals can I use in the iK Multi TR 1?

- The iK Multi TR 1 is ideally suited for following products:
  - Disinfectants
  - Neutral products
  - Alcohols
  - Alkalis
  - Ketones
- The sprayer is of limited suitability for:
  - Acids

### Additional Information

| Brand | IK Sprayers |

![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/2220/8925/Screen_Shot_2023-12-08_at_2.25.36_PM__75447.1702063567.png?c=2)
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/2220/8922/84177-1__35492.1702064056.jpg?c=2)
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/2220/8923/84177-2__69399.1702063568.jpg?c=2)

## IK Multi TR 1 Heavy Duty Sprayer 35 oz - 360

### 360 system to spray in all positions!

The ideal partner for cleaning and disinfection tasks. With it your work will be easier and faster. These IK Sprayers are especially designed to be compatible with chemical agents used in the world of professional cleaning and disinfection. Best suited for all purpose cleaners, disinfectants, neutral chemicals, lightly concentrated acids (maximum 5%), and low-alkaline solutions (up to pH 11). Now available with the 360 system to spray in all different positions including upside down spraying.

### Features:
- 360 system to spray in all positions. Supports upside down spraying.
- Adjustable spray nozzle.
- Strong translucent tank with level indicator.
- Content identifying system.
- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free.
- Optimal for all purpose cleaners, disinfectants, neutral products, alcohols, alkalis and ketones. Partially resistant to acids (Chemical Product Table).

### Specifications:
- Net weight: 0.39 lb
- Gross weight: 0.39 lb
- Total capacity: 35 oz (1L)

### Cleaning and Maintenance of the Sprayer:
- After each use depressurize the sprayer and clean it.
- If the nozzle becomes blocked, clean it with water and do not use metallic objects.
- If the filter of the handle is clogged, remove it and clean it with water.
- Store the sprayer under cover, avoiding freezing temperatures and extreme heat (between 5 and 30 C).
- To prolong the life of the seals, regularly apply grease to the moving parts of the sprayer.

### Videos

Discover the new IK Multi, HC and upside down trigger sprayers...

# iK MULTI TR 1

![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-ndtdat03b2/images/stencil/1200x1200/products/9343/16532/ik-pressure-sprayers-ik-multi-tr-1__42310.1663862374.jpg?c=1)
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-ndtdat03b2/images/stencil/1200x1200/products/9343/16215/ik-pressure-sprayers-ik-multi-tr-1__90640.1663861878.jpg?c=1)
![image](https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-ndtdat03b2/images/stencil/1200x1200/products/9343/19663/ik-pressure-sprayers-ik-multi-tr-1__32290.1663867401.jpg?c=1)

Spray the right way!

The iK Multi TR 1 Sprayer is a professional trigger spray bottle that delivers the highest performance in terms of safety and ease. The iK Multi TR 1 Sprayer is resistant to most acids and aggressive liquids, specifically designed for use in the professional automotive world, but can even be used for other areas and professions. The iK Multi TR 1 Sprayer contains useful features, including a high-quality atomizer.

The iK Multi TR 1 Sprayer features a strong, commercial-grade, translucent tank with a level indicator. The base is strong for increased stability and even features an adjustable nozzle and a content identifying system so that you can easily remember the chemicals you were using. Plus, it is easy to use.

The iK Multi TR 1 Sprayer is noted to spray diluted acids, alkalines & ketones and alcohols. It is optimal to be used with hydrocarbon based solvents, oils and lubricants, brake cleaners, petroleum by-products and even solvent-based pesticides.

Besides when being used in car care, the iK Multi TR 1 Sprayer can be used in building and construction, cleaning and disinfection, industry and maintenance and pest control.

# iK Multi TR-1 Trigger Sprayer

Brand: iK
SKU: 84170
Regular price: $13.02

![image](//www.carsupplieswarehouse.com/cdn/shop/products/ik-multi-tr-1-trigger-sprayer-412356.jpg?v=1734220939)

### Description

The IK Multi trigger sprayer is the ideal tool for any cleaning and disinfection work, optimal for spraying a wide variety of chemicals such as disinfectants, neutral products, alcohols, alkaline products and ketones.

The IK Multi TR 1 is a light and handy trigger sprayer that incorporates a base for greater stability, a colour-coded content identification system and a translucent tank that allows to check the level of liquid inside.
